title: The Return Of The Esmeralda 7 Solar Power Project
description:
The Esmeralda 7 solar power project could yet see the light of day, depending on who wins the race for Nevada Governor this fall.

The post The Return Of The Esmeralda 7 Solar Power Project appeared first on CleanTechnica.
